creditPacks.title: Buy credits directly without a subscription
creditPacks.subtitle: Three official TWD packs are available for ad hoc proposals, interior renders, batch product images, and extra video runs. Purchased credits do not reset with monthly billing.
creditPacks.noBonus: No bonus, best for light testing
creditPacks.featureCrossTool: Works across images, video, interiors, and product scenes
creditPacks.featureNoReset: Purchased credits do not reset monthly, ideal for project bursts
creditPacks.nonRefundable: ⚠ Credit packs are digital goods and are non-refundable once purchased.
creditPacks.purchaseFailed: Credit package purchase failed. Please try again.

pricing.subscribeFailed: Failed to subscribe. Please try again.
pricing.refundProcessed: Refund request submitted and notification sent. Subscription is cancelled immediately, plan credits reset, and e-invoice void flow is triggered.
pricing.subscriptionCancelled: Subscription cancelled. You can continue using credits until the end of your billing period.
pricing.cancelFailed: Failed to cancel subscription. Please try again.
pricing.confirmRefundMessage: You will receive a full refund. Your subscription will end immediately and subscription credits will be revoked. This cannot be undone.
pricing.confirmCancelMessage: Your subscription will stay active until the end of the current billing period. You will not be charged again. You can resubscribe anytime.

credits.a: Credits are used to generate content. Different tools consume different amounts of credits based on complexity.

rollover.a: Subscription credits reset every month and do NOT roll over. One-time credit packs never expire.

change.a: Yes, you can change your plan at any time. Changes take effect at the next billing cycle.

refund.a: You can request a refund within 7 days of subscribing if BOTH conditions are met: (1) you have used less than 5% of your monthly credit allowance (e.g. <22 credits on Standard); (2) you have not exported a watermark-free high-quality result yet. Otherwise the API cost is considered consumed and no refund is issued. One-time credit packs are digital goods and are non-refundable once purchased.

subscription.paymentSuccessDesc: Your subscription is now active. You can start using all features.
subscription.paymentCancelledDesc: You cancelled the payment. No charges were made.
subscription.paymentUnsuccessfulDesc: Your subscription payment didn't go through. Please try again.

imageTranslation.title: Image Translation
imageTranslation.desc: Expand your global reach with VidGo AI's Image Translation feature. Instantly translate text within images into multiple languages, overcoming language barriers and connecting with a wider global customer base.

videoDubbing.title: Video Translation & Dubbing
videoDubbing.desc: Empower your content for a global audience with powerful AI that automatically translates and redubs your videos. Ensure your content resonates across different cultures, enhancing engagement and conversion rates worldwide.

fashionBrand.title: From Campus Startup to Global Entrepreneur: Virtual Try-On Helps a Brand Rise
fashionBrand.quote: After using VidGo AI's virtual try-on, I can generate realistic model photos in seconds, cutting costs and saving time. My click-through rate increased by 50%, and conversions rose by over 40%.

furnitureBrand.title: Multilingual Content Marketing: Easily Meet Global Market Demands
furnitureBrand.quote: With VidGo AI's image translation, we turned a time-consuming multilingual design process into an effortless workflow. Translation accuracy improved dramatically, and design productivity increased fivefold.

techBrand.title: From Zero to No.1: How a Tablet Brand Achieved Breakthrough Growth
techBrand.quote: With VidGo AI's marketing visuals and templates, we cut our visual production cycle from days to seconds. Design efficiency increased by 80%, and costs dropped by 90%.

ebikeBrand.title: From High Costs to Efficient Growth: Marketing Breakthroughs
ebikeBrand.quote: Since using VidGo AI's Templates feature, our ad CTR increased by 50%, ROAS improved by 40%, and what took 3 days now takes 10 minutes, cutting costs by 90%.

tryOn.title: Virtual Try-On
tryOn.desc: Upload clothing images to generate studio-quality model showcase photos in seconds, at a fraction of traditional photoshoot cost. Dramatically simplify your e-commerce workflow.

bgRemoval.title: One-Click Smart Background Removal
bgRemoval.desc: Easily remove cluttered backgrounds online. Using state-of-the-art AI algorithms, one-click batch processing that perfects every detail.

room.title: Room Redesign
room.desc: Upload an interior photo. AI intelligently redesigns into multiple styles. Modern, Nordic, Japanese, Industrial — one-click design proposals that improve client pitching efficiency 5x.

testimonials.name: Ryan Chen
testimonials.text: Since using VidGo AI's video and marketing image tools, our ad CTR increased 50%, ROAS improved 40%, material production went from 3 days to 10 minutes, and costs dropped 90%.

testimonials.name: Lisa Wang
testimonials.text: VidGo AI has been a game-changer for my store. Just upload a flat image of the clothing, and it instantly gives me a realistic model try-on photo. This makes listings much more appealing.

testimonials.name: Mark Thompson
testimonials.text: AI Dubbing from VidGo AI has transformed how we create content. The video translation features are seamless, offering a natural and engaging experience for our international customers.

testimonials.name: Sarah Kim
testimonials.text: Image Translation by VidGo AI is a masterpiece for global e-commerce. It effortlessly translates text within images, making our products accessible to a worldwide audience.

howTo.heading: How to use
howTo.reuploadNote: If the format is not supported, you will be asked to re-upload in a supported format.

background_removal.step1: Pick one of the demo subjects or upload your own photo.
background_removal.step2: Click Remove Background to get a transparent PNG.
background_removal.step3: Download or send the result straight to other tools.

product_scene.step1: Pick or upload a clean product photo (white or transparent background works best).
product_scene.step2: Pick a scene preset or describe your own (subscribers).
product_scene.step3: Click Generate to get a polished commerce-ready scene shot.

try_on.step1: Upload a clear garment photo (flat-lay or product page works best).
try_on.step2: Pick a default model or upload a full-body model photo.
try_on.step3: Click Try It On to preview the garment on the chosen model.

room_redesign.step1: Pick a room photo or use one of the demo rooms below.
room_redesign.step2: Choose a room type, design style, and (optional) extra notes.
room_redesign.step3: Click Generate to get a redesigned 2D image; subscribers can also create a 3D walk-through.

v2v.step1: Upload an MP4, WebM, or MOV video up to 100MB.
v2v.step2: Pick a style transform from the catalog.
v2v.step3: Click Generate to apply the AI style transform.

i2v.step1: Pick a demo image or upload your own product / scene image.
i2v.step2: Choose a motion / effect from the catalog.
i2v.step3: Click Generate to create a short video clip.

ai_avatar.step1: Pick a default avatar or upload your own front-facing portrait.
ai_avatar.step2: Pick a script category or paste your own script.
ai_avatar.step3: Choose voice and language, then click Generate Video.

image_translator.step1: Pick a demo image or upload your own poster / packshot / banner.
image_translator.step3: Click Translate to keep the layout and replace the text.

video_dubbing.step1: Pick a sample video to preview the dubbing flow.
video_dubbing.step2: Subscribers can upload their own MP4 / WebM / MOV.
video_dubbing.step3: Choose source / target language and click Generate Dubbing.

upscale.step1: Pick a demo image or upload your own low-resolution image.
upscale.step3: Click Upscale and download the HD result.

adminModels.title: AI Model Registry
adminModels.subtitle: Swap upstream AI models (Midjourney / Kling / Flux / Luma …) at runtime. Reads from DB first, env var second, hardcoded default last.
adminModels.restartWarning: Saved overrides propagate to every running backend instance within seconds via Redis pub/sub. If Redis is unavailable the change still persists in DB and takes effect on next instance restart.
adminModels.pickHint: Pick a service key from the list to edit.
adminModels.reasonPlaceholder: Why are you changing this? Will be saved to the audit log.
adminModels.metricsEmpty: No call data in this window yet. Metrics are captured per provider call going forward.
adminModels.filterPlaceholder: Filter by family, name, key, or model…
adminModels.noMatches: No service keys match your filter.

vision.textOverridden: Your text conflicted with the image; the image content was used instead.
vision.gapGeneric: Output was adjusted to better match your uploaded image.
